field_values.action_summary: Tars Tarkas approaches Carter and assists him in selecting quarters within a large building near Sola and the other prisoners. Carter makes a strategic choice, selecting a room on the third floor to maintain proximity to Dejah Thoris.
field_values.emotional_beat: From tension/paranoia to pragmatic planning and tactical positioning.
field_values.camera_intent: Two-shots of john_carter and tars_tarkas walking and discussing; Establishing shots of carters_quarters_building and floor views; POV shots from the third floor looking toward target locations
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Visual relationship between building elevation and prisoner locations
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH012_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the physical transition of john_carter from a prisoner to a chieftain by securing permanent quarters. The scene must visually demonstrate his tactical decision-making through spatial selection within carters_quarters_building, prioritizing proximity to Dejah Thoris via floor height.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas

## Required Environments
- thark_city_plaza
- carters_quarters_building (Interior/Stairs/Third Floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise selection of the third floor level.
- Visual alignment between the window view and prisoner locations.

## Beat List
- BT001: Approach the building in the plaza.
- BT002: Ascend through the building levels.
- BT003: Select the third floor room and survey the tactical view.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
